description: Composition Dark green sweatshirt jacket made of 100% polyester Stratermic fleece, has long raglan sleeves, a mock neck, short zip opening with fleece lining behind zip for non-itch comfort, branding on shoulder and slightly dropped hem at back Wash care Machine wash warm Do not bleach, tumble dry, iron or dry clean Trust outdoors experts quechua to provide great simple designs which will keep you toasty warm. Extremely lightweight due to the Stratermic fleece. Model Statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
